name: coLssConfigNodeId
title: coLssConfigNodeId
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
void coLssConfigNodeId( dword nodeId, dword errCode[] );
With this service, the LSS master configures the node-ID of a LSS slave. Only one LSS slave may be in configuration mode.
nodeId Node-ID that should be given to the LSS slave, value range 1..127 If the value 0xFF is specified, then the previous node-ID is invalidated.
errCode Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field)
Example dword errCode[1];coLssConfigNodeId( 1, errCode );if (errCode[0] == 0) { write( "LSS configure nodeId commanded" );}
